productName: HiKu - DOH DIST - Pineapple Sunset - HiKu 1oz Tincture - Pineapple Sunset - 30g
description: A polished cannabis tincture made for control and convenience — place drops under the tongue or stir into a favorite drink. A subtle crisp, sweet apple note makes each drop a little easier to enjoy. Discreet, precise, and easy to dose.
